## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and lead generation efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance: 24 leads generated this month (8 new since last week), 6k clicks in 22 days, on track for 8k clicks and 1.3M impressions this month](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Industry focus: Beauty articles outperforming fashion; footwear industry content strategy in development](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Action items: Install Microsoft Clarity for heatmaps, create footwear-specific playbook, analyze top-performing keywords across channels](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and SEO Progress

  - [10 new articles developed but not yet published](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [6,000 clicks in 22 days, 1 million impressions](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [24 leads generated this month (up from 16 last week)](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [20% decrease in impression growth for Rotex articles (280k to 220k)](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [On track for 7k clicks and 1.3M impressions this month](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Industry-Specific Content Analysis

  - [Fashion: 25 articles, \~400 clicks in last 28 days](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Beauty: 25 articles, \~500 clicks in last 28 days](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Beauty outperforming due to top 3 articles ranking higher](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Learning: Focus on industry trends and statistics content](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Footwear Industry Content Strategy

  - [10 initial topics planned, including industry trends, AI in footwear, marketing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Suggestion to create omnichannel experience content, discuss size/fit challenges, and highlight user-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

### Website Behavior Analysis

  - [Need for heatmap tool to understand user behavior on blog pages](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [Microsoft Clarity suggested as a free option for implementation](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Goal: Understand which CTAs and gated content are most effective](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)

### Sales Team Alignment

  - [Four main vertical categories identified for sales efforts](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Each vertical includes both retailer and brand sides (e.g., Home Improvement: Lowe's vs. GE)](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [Need for specific content tailored to each vertical and approach](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)

### Google Ads and SEO Keyword Alignment

  - [Winnie working on Google Ads keywords](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Suggestion to dedicate 5 minutes weekly to discuss keyword performance across SEO and paid efforts](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Long-term goal: Rank organically for paid keywords to reduce ad spend](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)

### Lead Generation Analysis

  - [Review of April form submissions from blog visitors](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Need for deeper analysis of brand names and report interests (e.g., State of Video Commerce 2025 report)](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [Suggestion to break down reports into industry-specific versions](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Install Microsoft Clarity for heatmap analysis on blog pages](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Create a footwear-specific content playbook](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Provide detailed lead analysis (source page, clicked lead magnet, brand names)](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [Share top-performing keywords report for both blog and overall website (last 20 days)](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [Discuss potential UI changes for lead generation in Monday's call](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
  - [Analyze and share insights on keywords resonating with the audience across channels](https://fathom.video/share/Zj2GhHsccebxFn1R6pxftw917zBsMkXF?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
